title: Selene
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Sith |image= |name=Selene |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[3956 BBY]],''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]]''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You knew someone named Selene?''"
"''Selene? She's the one who convinced me to come to the academy with her.|Carth Onasi and his son Dustil|}} '''Selene''' was [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who convinced her friend, [[Dustil Onasi]], to join her as a [[Sith acolyte/Legends|Sith Acolyte]] at the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]]. Regarded by [[Headmaster/Legends|Headmaster]] [[Uthar Wynn]] as an obstacle to Onasi's progress, she was [[Death/Legends|killed]] on Wynn's orders. ==Biography== Selene was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who lived during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. At some point after the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Telos IV]] was [[Bombing of Telos IV|bombed]] by the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]], Selene convinced her friend [[Dustil Onasi]], the [[Parent/Legends|son]] of [[Carth Onasi]] and a survivor of the bombing, to go with her to the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]]. The pair trained there as [[Sith acolyte/Legends|Sith Acolytes]]. Headmaster Uthar Wynn observed that Selene did not have the same talent in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] as Onasi. Believing that Onasi's progress was held back by his affection for Selene, Wynn gave orders for Selene to be removed from the Academy and killed, then he told Onasi that she had died on a mission in the [[Valley of the Dark Lords/Legends|Valley of the Dark Lords]]. He believed the apprentice would soon forget Selene and maintained records regarding her death in his [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]]. Carth Onasi arrived on Korriban with [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], the former [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]], and discovered that his son had survived the bombing of their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. Dustil initially refused to join his father and did not believe that the Sith were as evil as his father claimed. After Carth and Revan provided Wynn's datapad as evidence that the Sith had killed Selene, Dustil agreed that he would leave the Academy after he warned other students. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Selene |fi=Selene }} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Sith of Revan's Sith Empire]]
